generation_instruction: Generate diverse multi-turn scenarios covering flight search, hotel booking, expense submission within and over policy limits, multi-intent routing across travel and expenses, and complex travel planning with budget analysis.
environment_context: Corporate travel and expense management system. Expense policy limits: meals ($75), transport ($200), lodging ($400), supplies ($100), entertainment ($150). Available MCP tools: search_flights, search_hotels, book_flight, book_hotel, check_expense_policy, submit_expense, get_user_expenses.
